narrative:
Preble County has 27,661 registered voters, with 53.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.4% of registrants.
